name: smma/subscribe-now
title: Subscribe Now
description: A subscription pricing block with Free, Business (highlighted), and Corporate tiers.

default.name: Free
default.description: Perfect for individuals just getting started. Access basic features with no commitment.

default.name: Business
default.description: Ideal for growing teams. Unlock advanced tools, priority support, and more integrations.

default.name: Corporate
default.description: Full-scale solution for enterprises. Custom onboarding, dedicated account manager, SLA.
